name: clikit-plugin
description: Workflow layer for OpenCode — agents, commands, hooks, memory, and verification

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && cp src/clikit.schema.json dist/clikit.schema.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.postpublish: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const os=require('os'); const path=require('path'); const root=path.join(os.homedir(),'.cache','opencode'); fs.rmSync(path.join(root,'node_modules','clikit-plugin'),{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.rmSync(path.join(root,'bun.lock'),{force:true}); console.log('✓ Cleared OpenCode plugin cache — next start will install fresh');"
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run build

author: Kira
